default.tagline: Become a Strategic Mutual fund DIY Investor

hero.title: Become a Strategic Mutual fund DIY Investor.
hero.subtitle: The Asp Fin Academy welcomes you! We offer courses based on a variety of subjects including investing, personal finance, insurance and the stock market. Now choose a topic and start learning.

preview.title: If they can do it, you can too.
preview.description: Our courses are designed to empower you with the knowledge and confidence to take control of your financial future. Whether you're a beginner or looking to deepen your understanding, our expert-led sessions and practical case-based learning will guide you every step of the way.

reviews.name: Neha George
reviews.text: ASP helped me understand mutual funds clearly and build a disciplined investment plan with confidence.

reviews.name: Rahul Krishnan
reviews.text: Simple, transparent, and practical advice — perfect for anyone starting their investment journey.

reviews.name: Anandhu Sundaran
reviews.text: Great guidance on portfolio structuring and long-term wealth planning. Very reliable service.
